title: Is Solar Worth It in Wollongong in 2026?
excerpt: With electricity prices at 30–34¢/kWh and strong Illawarra sun hours, a 6.6kW system typically pays for itself in 4–6 years. Here's the honest breakdown for Wollongong homeowners.
metaDescription: Is solar worth it in Wollongong in 2026? We break down real costs, rebates, payback periods and savings for Illawarra homeowners. Honest, local numbers.

title: Solar Panel Cost Wollongong: Real Prices After Rebates [2026]
excerpt: A quality 6.6kW system in Wollongong costs $6,800–$8,500 after the federal STC rebate. Here are the real installed prices — and what to watch out for with cheap quotes.
metaDescription: Real solar panel costs in Wollongong in 2026. See installed prices for 6.6kW, 10kW and 13kW systems after STC rebates, plus what affects your final price.

title: NSW Solar Rebates 2026: Every Incentive Explained
excerpt: NSW homeowners can access federal STCs worth $2,800–$3,800, the Cheaper Home Batteries Program, and retailer incentives in 2026. Here's every rebate explained clearly.
metaDescription: Complete guide to NSW solar rebates in 2026 — STC scheme, Cheaper Home Batteries Program, feed-in tariffs and more. Find out exactly what you're entitled to.

title: The 2026 STC Solar Rebate Explained — And Why You Should Act Now
excerpt: The Federal Government's Small-scale Technology Certificate scheme is the biggest solar rebate available in Australia — worth $2,800–$3,800 on a standard 6.6kW install. Here's exactly how it works, what you'll get in 2026, and why waiting costs you money.

title: Is Battery Storage Worth It in 2026? An Honest Look at the Numbers
excerpt: Feed-in tariffs have dropped to 5–8¢/kWh while electricity rates sit at 28–33¢/kWh. We run the numbers on whether adding a Tesla Powerwall or BYD battery makes financial sense for South Coast homeowners.

title: 10 Questions to Ask Any Solar Installer Before You Sign Anything
excerpt: Not all solar quotes are equal — and some are downright deceptive. Before you sign anything, ask these 10 questions. A reputable installer will answer all of them without hesitation.

title: Going Solar in Wollongong: What Illawarra Homeowners Need to Know
excerpt: Wollongong and the Illawarra have some of the best solar conditions in NSW — but there are local factors that affect your system's performance. Here's what we've learned from installing 1,200+ systems in the region.
